subject: BUG: Enterprise checkout broken
body: URGENT: Major bug found in the enterprise checkout flow. Please fix immediately.

subject: New features for our plan?
body: We are a large company interested in your roadmap for the next quarter.

subject: Minor bug in mobile view
body: The sidebar is slightly cut off on iPhone 13. Not critical but annoying.

subject: Suggestion for dark mode
body: Can you add a dark mode to the next release? Many users are asking for it.

subject: Urgent: Billing discrepancy
body: I was charged twice for the Platinum subscription this month. Please resolve.

subject: Internal update: OFFICE-05
body: New desk assignments for the OFFICE-05 floor are now live in the system.

subject: Partnership Inquiry
body: Interested in exploring a strategic partnership for the EMEA region.

subject: Beta testing feedback
body: The beta version is stable, but the onboarding flow could be smoother.

subject: Critical Security Patch
body: Please apply the latest security patch to all production servers by EOD.

subject: Team Lunch
body: Don't forget the team lunch tomorrow at 12:30 PM at the Italian place.
